charset=utf-8 Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Cache-Control: public, max-age=14400, s-maxage=60 Cdn-Cache-Control: max-age=60 Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin Etag: W/"5f7-gJiYqcwcxD7jRj00kOp90HWgPMY" Nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} Origin-Agent-Cluster: ?1 Ratelimit-Limit: 20 Ratelimit-Policy: 20;w=60 Ratelimit-Remaining: 19 Ratelimit-Reset: 60 Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin Report-To: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=OJuqrnzjQE%2Brb0R7SXTl1IzuXje9Wz57tEnOmjlMCYw%3D\u0026sid=c4c9725f-1ab0-44d8-820f-430df2718e11\u0026ts=1784135774"}],"max_age":3600} Reporting-Endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=OJuqrnzjQE%2Brb0R7SXTl1IzuXje9Wz57tEnOmjlMCYw%3D&sid=c4c9725f-1ab0-44d8-820f-430df2718e11&ts=1784135774" Server: cloudflare Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains Via: 1.1 heroku-router X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Dns-Prefetch-Control: off X-Download-Options: noopen X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies: none X-Powered-By: ReqRes.in - Deploy backends in 30 seconds X-Ratelimit-Limit: 250 X-Ratelimit-Remaining: 249 X-Ratelimit-Reset: 1784160000 X-Reqres-Docs: https://reqres.in X-Reqres-Message: This API is powered by ReqRes. Build custom collections - app.reqres.in/dashboard X-Reqres-Trial: true X-Reqres-Trial-Days-Remaining: 14 X-Reqres-Trial-Expires: 2026-07-29T17:11:48.052Z X-Reqres-Upgrade: https://app.reqres.in/upgrade X-Request-Id: 5458607e-4daa-094b-65d3-ffe289c48c25 X-Robots-Tag: noindex, nofollow X-Xss-Protection: 0 Age: 54 Cf-Cache-Status: HIT Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: a1ba6b40d99e8f20-MIA
